title: [SMS Remix] - Super Mario Land 2 - Star Maze
description:
Did a VRC6 cover of this song a while ago. Now I cover it again, but limiting myself by using the SN76489 sound chip.

Title: Super Mario Land 2: 6 Golden Coins - Star Maze
Original composer: Kazumi Totaka
Cover by: Daniel "Kuhneghetz" Ohlsson
Tracker used: SnevenTracker
Sound-Chip used: SN76489

A playable VGM file (NTSC only) of this song can be downloaded here:
https://mega.nz/file/k1Q2WAbb#yzegcqJx4aA7W4K8ln0G0sLm3V0wWtzb4maww6nzAR8
